_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule): base-knowledge.md §2 documents the resource pattern (users/me/dataTypes/{dataType}/dataPoints), the reconcile/dailyRollup methods, and that fields nest under `<data_type>.<field>` plus a `dataSource` wrapper (platform, device.displayName, recordingMethod) -- but not an exact response envelope. This fixture assumes a Google-API-conventional list envelope: a top-level `point` array plus `nextPageToken`, each point carrying `dataPointId`/`startTime`/`endTime` (RFC 3339), a `dataSource` object, and a `value` object whose keys are `<dataType.filterName>.<field>` (here `steps.count`). Steps is an Interval (I) type per base-knowledge.md §3, so each point covers a short interval rather than an instant.
